Fraud, scams and financial crime.description: Misuse of AI to increase the scale, realism or targeting of fraud and financial exploitation.
Fraud, scams and financial crime.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR generative AI OR deepfake OR voice cloning OR chatbot OR LLM) (fraud OR scam OR phishing OR impersonation OR mule account OR romance scam OR synthetic identity OR payment fraud OR financial crime)

Deepfake NCII and intimate image abuse.description: Synthetic intimate image abuse, nudification tools and non-consensual intimate image harms.
Deepfake NCII and intimate image abuse.query: (AI OR deepfake OR synthetic media OR generative AI OR nudify OR image generator) (non-consensual intimate OR intimate image abuse OR image-based abuse OR deepfake abuse OR explicit deepfake)

Other AI-enabled VAWG behaviours.description: AI-enabled stalking, harassment, coercive behaviour, sextortion and wider technology-facilitated abuse.
Other AI-enabled VAWG behaviours.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR chatbot OR LLM OR generative AI OR voice cloning OR deepfake) (VAWG OR violence against women OR stalking OR harassment OR coercion OR sextortion OR digital abuse OR technology-facilitated abuse)

Child safeguarding and online protection.description: Signals about child safeguarding, online protection, platform safety and AI-related safeguarding risks.
Child safeguarding and online protection.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR generative AI OR deepfake OR image generator OR chatbot) (child safety OR child safeguarding OR online child protection OR IWF OR NSPCC OR Ofcom online safety OR child protection technology)

Terrorism, extremism and radicalisation.description: AI-enabled extremist propaganda, radicalisation, recruitment, synthetic media or attack-planning capability.
Terrorism, extremism and radicalisation.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR chatbot OR LLM OR generative AI OR deepfake) (terrorism OR terrorist OR extremism OR extremist OR radicalisation OR radicalization OR terrorist propaganda OR extremist recruitment OR attack planning)

Cyber, malware and illegal items.description: AI-enabled cyber misuse, malware, exploit development, prompt injection, and facilitation of illegal items.
Cyber, malware and illegal items.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR LLM OR generative AI OR agentic AI OR AI agent) (malware OR ransomware OR exploit OR jailbreak OR prompt injection OR weapons OR drugs OR dark web OR cybercrime OR vulnerability)

Realistic fakes, evidence and identity a.description: AI-generated realistic fakes affecting identity, public trust, evidential integrity, borders or justice processes.
Realistic fakes, evidence and identity a.query: (AI OR deepfake OR synthetic media OR generative AI OR voice cloning OR image generator) (false evidence OR fake document OR fake identity OR identity abuse OR border OR immigration OR misinformation OR impersonation)

AI agents and capability uplift watchlis.description: Emerging agentic systems or capability uplift signals that may change offender workflows or defensive requirements.
AI agents and capability uplift watchlis.query: (AI agent OR agentic AI OR autonomous AI OR computer use agent OR AI browser) (cybercrime OR fraud OR scam OR misuse OR safety OR security OR vulnerability OR autonomous attack OR prompt injection)

Use of AI to tackle crime and public saf.description: Examples of AI being used by law enforcement, regulators, platforms or public bodies to prevent, detect or respond to crime and harm.
Use of AI to tackle crime and public saf.query: (AI OR artificial intelligence OR machine learning OR generative AI) (police OR law enforcement OR regulator OR public safety OR crime detection OR fraud detection OR safeguarding tool OR investigation tool OR victim support OR content moderation)
